top_signals.title: Stocks Fall as US Pushes Back on Iran Draft Report: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Wall Street traders halted a rally in stocks as optimism over a resolution of hostilities in the Middle East waned, with the White House pushing back on the existence of a draft deal to revive the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: European Stocks Erase Gains After US Denies Peace Deal Reports
top_signals.summary: European stocks were steady after erasing gains as hopes for a deal between Tehran and Washington were dampened by the White House denying Iranian reports about a draft memorandum of understanding.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
top_signals.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: CISA gives feds 4 days to patch actively exploited cPanel plugin flaw
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has given U.S. federal agencies four days to secure their servers against a critical vulnerability in the LiteSpeed cPanel user-end plugin, which is actively being exploited in attacks. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Philip R. Lane: Interview with Nikkei
Assessing the Impact of Energy Bill Support in 2022–23 on Bank Rate and Mortgage Rates
top_signals.summary: This note sets out how HMT assessed the estimated effect of the 2022–23 Energy Bill Support measures on Bank Rate and, in turn, on the cost of a new representative mortgage.

top_signals.title: ArcBest launches shipment execution platform
top_signals.summary:
ArcBest announced the launch of ArcBest View, a digital platform allowing logistics customers to manage all shipments and shipment functions through a single interface.

The post ArcBest launches shipment execution platform appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: StakeDAO exploit creates 5.4 trillion vsdCRV but nets only $91K
top_signals.summary: PeckShield said the attacker bridged 43.7 ETH to Ethereum after minting trillions of vsdCRV, while EmberCN said most of the remaining tokens had insufficient liquidity to sell.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: KBRA Releases Research – Coming of Age: The Evolution of European Middle Market CLOs
top_signals.summary: KBRA releases research that examines the evolution of European middle market collateralised loan obligations (CLO) and the role they may play in the financing, distribution, and management of private credit portfolios across Europe as the market matures.
